positive: A highly stylized, centered illustration of a cosmic celestial tapestry featuring interconnected stylized mandalas, crescent moons, shooting stars, and ethereal swirling nebulas. The design should utilize strong, clean silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and deep purple gradient background. Accent colors include vibrant nebula teal, iridescent gold, and glowing magenta. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and cosmic geometry, optimized for high contrast and clean lines, suitable for a textile print. Central composition, perfect symmetry, perfect circular layout.
